metadata.title: Harmonies Score Sheet
metadata.description: Manual scoring app for Harmonies landscapes, animal cards, and Nature's Spirit cards.

header.subtitle: Score Sheet
header.intro: Manual scoring for landscapes, animal cards, and Nature's Spirit cards. Use Side A for rivers and Side B for islands.

landscapes.title: Landscapes
landscapes.description: Enter only scoring groups or valid structures. The app calculates subtotals from the official rules.

greenOnly.label: Green-only trees
greenOnly.help: Single green token trees score 1 point each.

brownGreen.label: Brown + green trees
brownGreen.help: Trees with 1 brown under 1 green score 3 points.

doubleBrownGreen.label: 2 brown + green trees
doubleBrownGreen.help: Trees with 2 brown under 1 green score 5 points.

groups.label: Field groups
groups.help: Count each yellow group of size 2 or more once.

valid.label: Valid buildings
valid.help: Each must be surrounded by at least 3 different colors.

longestRiver.label: Longest river
longestRiver.help: Side A only. Score 0, 2, 5, 8, 11, 15, then +4 per token above 6.

islandCount.label: Island count
islandCount.help: Side B only. There is always at least 1 island.

animals.title: Animal Cards
animals.description: Enter the total points from all animal cards combined. Example: if all animals sum to 27 points, enter 27.

natureSpirit.title: Nature's Spirit
natureSpirit.description: Enter the total points granted by your spirit card. Example: if the spirit gives 20 points, enter 20.

totals.title: Totals
totals.description: Landscape and card scores are tracked separately to match the printed score pad.
